mvpGoal: Create a one-screen artifact that turns a long school or civic notice into source-linked household action cards, while keeping uncertainty visible.

screens.name: Notice Action Workspace
screens.purpose: Let a parent or local resident inspect a sample notice, see extracted actions, and identify unresolved confirmation questions.
interactions: select an action card to reveal the source sentence and extraction reason
toggle between all actions, due soon, and needs confirmation
mark a card as ready or needs follow-up to update the review status

acceptanceCriteria: First screen shows the source notice and at least three extracted action cards.
Each action card exposes a source quote or evidence reference.
At least one user-controlled interaction changes visible state.
Uncertainty is not hidden; unresolved questions appear as their own queue.
The artifact can run with static local data and does not require login, external APIs, paid services, or official-school integrations.
nonGoals: Do not send messages to schools or families.
Do not claim official interpretation of the notice.
Do not parse arbitrary uploaded PDFs in this P0 artifact.
Do not build a multi-page family operations platform.
safetyConstraints: Keep all advice framed as extracted planning support, not official instruction.
Show uncertainty and source evidence beside generated actions.
Use static sample notice data only.
Avoid collecting personal student, family, or school information.
Require human review before any real-world communication or publication.
